calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Vacated

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Attys. MARK S. GREENSTONE of Glancy, Binkow & Goldberg, LLP, (Tel No. 310-201-9150) and JONATHAN LEE of Captsone Law, APC (Tel No. 310-712-8006) appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Daniel Huerta;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DANIEL HUERTA'S Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963 (302/HK)
